## Meeting Purpose

[To reduce content review time by aligning on Cresta's product messaging and differentiators.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Differentiator:** Cresta's AI infers business outcomes (e.g., CSAT, sales) from conversations, enabling data-driven coaching and automation. This is a key advantage over competitors who only track keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**New Messaging Focus:** Emphasize "Automation Discovery" (Insights) and "Real-time Capabilities" (QM). The latter is a newly validated differentiator against Observe AI, correcting prior feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [**Strategic Entry Point:** Insights is the primary entry point for new customers due to its low-risk, high-value data discovery. It then informs the design of AI Agents, creating a powerful, data-driven automation story.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [**Content Approval:** The United Airlines and CVS Health case studies are public and approved for use. All competitive differentiators discussed are also approved for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

## Topics

### Cresta's Core Differentiator: Outcome Inference

  - [The central thesis: Cresta's AI infers business outcomes (e.g., CSAT, sales, resolution) from conversations, a capability competitors lack.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Why it matters:** This allows contact centers to identify and prioritize agent behaviors that directly drive business results.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Example:** Acknowledging a customer's poor experience predicts a \~30% increase in CSAT. This data-backed insight enables targeted coaching.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### Product 1: Insights

  - [**Purpose:** Analyze contact center conversations at scale to uncover business-critical information.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Three-Phase Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
    1.  [**Discovery:** Unsupervised LLMs find "unknown unknowns" (e.g., emerging topics, customer questions).](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
    2.  [**Tracking:** Users monitor specific trends with custom dashboards and intent maps.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
    3.  **Action:** Insights inform four key areas:
          - [**Automating Conversations:** "Automation Discovery" identifies topics suitable for AI agents and maps their workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
          - [**Augmenting Human Agents:** Real-time hints guide agents toward high-impact behaviors.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
          - [**Augmenting Customer Journeys:** Fixing friction points outside the contact center.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
              - [**United Airlines Case Study:** Identified an app flow issue → fixed it → saved millions by deflecting calls.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
          - [**Making Better Business Decisions:** Informing policy or messaging changes.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
              - [**CVS Health Case Study:** Spotted customer anger over a drug's coverage change → issued new agent talking points same-day.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:** "Automation Discovery" is a new feature and a key differentiator that needs more content.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Product 2: Quality Management (QM) & Coach

  - [**Purpose:** Automate and improve the traditional manual QA process.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [**Problem with Manual QA:**](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Low coverage (1–5% of calls) creates an inaccurate picture of agent performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [Coaching based on this limited data feels unfair and demotivating for agents.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Cresta's Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Data-Driven Scorecards:** Scorecards are built from behaviors proven to drive outcomes, not just a static checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**100% Conversation Coverage:** AI scores all conversations, eliminating sampling bias and providing a complete, fair view of performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Targeted Coaching:** Managers get specific data (e.g., "Agent X missed 8 opportunities to verify a device reboot this week") to deliver actionable, data-backed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators vs. Competitors:**](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Outcome Inference:** The core advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [**Real-time Capabilities:** A newly validated differentiator against Observe AI.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [**AI Agent Oversight:** Cresta's 7+ years of QM experience for human agents applies directly to monitoring generative AI agents, a key advantage over newer players (e.g., Sierra, Decagon).](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Odhran:** Share new product decks and competitive materials with Aida and Bailey as they are created.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [Incorporate "Automation Discovery" into future Insights content.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [Highlight "Real-time Capabilities" as a key differentiator for Quality Management.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [Use the United Airlines and CVS Health case studies to provide concrete examples of value.](https://fathom.video/share/nE1jkpq7z9xTsuZLUnZAijN5ivoDyx8i?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
